name: avatar
description: User avatar with image, fallback initials, and optional status indicator.

docs.usage:
<Avatar src="/photo.jpg" alt="Aria Chen" size="md" status="online" />

<AvatarGroup max={3}>
  <Avatar fallback="AC" />
  <Avatar fallback="MO" />
  <Avatar fallback="PN" />
  <Avatar fallback="+4" />
</AvatarGroup>

props.name: alt
props.description: Alt text — first 2 chars used as fallback initials
